result.preview:
"Postgres query exectution error (ProgrammingError): (psycopg2.errors.UndefinedFunction) operator does not exist: text >= date
LINE 9:   JOIN params p ON ch.createddate >= p.start_date AND ch.cre...
                                          ^
HINT:  No operator matches the given name and argument types. You might need to add explicit type casts.

[SQL: WITH params AS (
  SELECT DATE '2022-04-01' AS start_date, DATE '2023-04-10' AS end_date
), assignments AS (
  SELECT 
    ch.caseid__c AS case_id,
    regexp_replace(COALESCE(ch.oldvalue__c,''), '^#', '') AS old_owner,
    regexp_replace(COALESCE(ch.newvalue__c,''), '^#', '') AS new_owner
  FROM casehistory__c ch
  JOIN params p ON ch.createddate >= p.start_date AND ch.createddate < p.end_date
  WHERE ch.field__c = 'Owner'
), transferred_from AS (
  -- each row is a transfer from old_owner to new_owner; count transfer for old_owner
  SELECT old_owner AS agent_id, COUNT(*) AS transfer_count
  FROM assignments
  WHERE old_owner <> '' AND new_owner <> '' AND old_owner <> new_owner
  GROUP BY old_owner
), handled_agents AS (
  -- agents who appeared in any owner assignment (old or new) within the window
  SELECT DISTINCT old_owner AS agent_id FROM assignments WHERE old_owner <> ''
  UNION
  SELECT DISTINCT new_owner AS agent_id FROM assignments WHERE new_owner <> ''
)
SELECT ha.agent_id AS "Id",
       COALESCE(tf.transfer_count, 0) AS transfer_count
FROM handled_agents ha
LEFT JOIN transferred_from tf ON tf.agent_id = ha.agent_id
WHERE COALESCE(tf.transfer_count, 0) >= 0
ORDER BY COALESCE(tf.transfer_count, 0) ASC, ha.agent_id ASC
LIMIT 1;]
(Background on this error at: https://sqlalche.me/e/20/f405)"

args.query:
WITH params AS (
  SELECT DATE '2022-04-01' AS start_date, DATE '2023-04-10' AS end_date
), assignments AS (
  SELECT 
    ch.caseid__c AS case_id,
    regexp_replace(COALESCE(ch.oldvalue__c,''), '^#', '') AS old_owner,
    regexp_replace(COALESCE(ch.newvalue__c,''), '^#', '') AS new_owner
  FROM casehistory__c ch
  JOIN params p ON ch.createddate >= p.start_date AND ch.createddate < p.end_date
  WHERE ch.field__c = 'Owner'
), transferred_from AS (
  -- each row is a transfer from old_owner to new_owner; count transfer for old_owner
  SELECT old_owner AS agent_id, COUNT(*) AS transfer_count
  FROM assignments
  WHERE old_owner <> '' AND new_owner <> '' AND old_owner <> new_owner
  GROUP BY old_owner
), handled_agents AS (
  -- agents who appeared in any owner assignment (old or new) within the window
  SELECT DISTINCT old_owner AS agent_id FROM assignments WHERE old_owner <> ''
  UNION
  SELECT DISTINCT new_owner AS agent_id FROM assignments WHERE new_owner <> ''
)
SELECT ha.agent_id AS "Id",
       COALESCE(tf.transfer_count, 0) AS transfer_count
FROM handled_agents ha
LEFT JOIN transferred_from tf ON tf.agent_id = ha.agent_id
WHERE COALESCE(tf.transfer_count, 0) >= 0
ORDER BY COALESCE(tf.transfer_count, 0) ASC, ha.agent_id ASC
LIMIT 1;

    regexp_replace(COALESCE(ch.oldvalue__c,''), '^#', '') AS old_owner,
    regexp_replace(COALESCE(ch.newvalue__c,''), '^#', '') AS new_owner
  FROM casehistory__c ch
  JOIN params p ON (ch.createddate::date >= p.start_date AND ch.createddate::date < p.end_date)
  WHERE ch.field__c = 'Owner'
), transferred_from AS (
  SELECT old_owner AS agent_id, COUNT(*) AS transfer_count
  FROM assignments
  WHERE old_owner <> '' AND new_owner <> '' AND old_owner <> new_owner

  SELECT DISTINCT old_owner AS agent_id FROM assignments WHERE old_owner <> ''

  SELECT DISTINCT new_owner AS agent_id FROM assignments WHERE new_owner <> ''

FROM handled_agents ha
LEFT JOIN transferred_from tf ON tf.agent_id = ha.agent_id
ORDER BY COALESCE(tf.transfer_count, 0) ASC, ha.agent_id ASC
LIMIT 1;

args.query: SELECT field__c, COUNT(*) AS cnt FROM casehistory__c GROUP BY field__c ORDER BY cnt DESC LIMIT 20;

exec_args.sql: SELECT field__c, COUNT(*) AS cnt FROM casehistory__c GROUP BY field__c ORDER BY cnt DESC LIMIT 20;

args.query:
WITH params AS (
  SELECT DATE '2022-04-01' AS start_date, DATE '2023-04-10' AS end_date
), assignments AS (
  SELECT 
    ch.caseid__c AS case_id,
    regexp_replace(COALESCE(ch.oldvalue__c,''), '^#', '') AS old_owner,
    regexp_replace(COALESCE(ch.newvalue__c,''), '^#', '') AS new_owner
  FROM casehistory__c ch
  JOIN params p ON (ch.createddate::date >= p.start_date AND ch.createddate::date < p.end_date)
  WHERE ch.field__c = 'Owner Assignment'
), transferred_from AS (
  SELECT old_owner AS agent_id, COUNT(*) AS transfer_count
  FROM assignments
  WHERE old_owner <> '' AND new_owner <> '' AND old_owner <> new_owner
  GROUP BY old_owner
), handled_agents AS (
  SELECT DISTINCT old_owner AS agent_id FROM assignments WHERE old_owner <> ''
  UNION
  SELECT DISTINCT new_owner AS agent_id FROM assignments WHERE new_owner <> ''
)
SELECT ha.agent_id AS "Id"
FROM handled_agents ha
LEFT JOIN transferred_from tf ON tf.agent_id = ha.agent_id
ORDER BY COALESCE(tf.transfer_count, 0) ASC, ha.agent_id ASC
LIMIT 1;
